entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of lacking sufficient financial resources to meet a minimum standard of living, analyzed in the context of rural India

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and erratic rainfall and specific climatic conditions where poverty is highly concentrated

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE LIVELIHOOD FRAMEWORK
entities.description: An analytical framework used to identify the underlying determinants of poverty and the pathways to move out of it

entities.name: NATIONAL SAMPLE SURVEYS
entities.description: Quantitative surveys used to generate classifications of relevant typologies in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on rural poverty is focused

entities.name: AGROECOLOGICAL ZONES
entities.description: Classifications of land based on ecological and agricultural characteristics

entities.name: OCCUPATIONAL GROUPS
entities.description: Classifications of people based on their primary source of employment

entities.name: IRRIGATION ACCESS
entities.description: The availability and use of artificial water supply for agriculture

entities.name: SOCIAL GROUPS
entities.description: Classifications of people based on social identity and stratification

entities.name: HUMID AREAS
entities.description: Regions characterized by high rainfall and humidity where poverty is also concentrated

entities.name: CASTE
entities.description: A social stratification system identified as a factor in the high incidence of poverty

entities.name: VILLAGE LEVEL STUDIES
entities.description: Research conducted at the village level to provide evidence on income, expenditure, and poverty

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: UNDER-NUTRITION
entities.description: A state of insufficient nutrient intake associated with poverty

entities.name: COPING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Methods employed by households to manage the impact of droughts and income shocks

entities.name: DROUGHTS
entities.description: Prolonged periods of water shortage affecting agriculture and income

entities.name: INCOME SHOCKS
entities.description: Sudden and unexpected decreases in household income

entities.name: POVERTY ALLEVIATION PROGRAMS
entities.description: Government or organizational initiatives aimed at reducing the incidence of poverty

entities.name: SAT AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices within the semi-arid tropics aimed at poverty reduction
